title: SPARQL-to-Text Question Generation for Knowledge-Based Conversational Applications
research_areas: T10 Question Answering, Open-domain question answering, closed-domain question answering, extractive and abstractive QA, multi-hop question answering

T29 NLP for education, Automated essay scoring and feedback generation, grammatical error correction and detection, intelligent tutoring systems
